title: selinopsis montana
intro: Selinopsis montana, also known as the mountain squalene or mountain selinopsis, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant contains squalene, a triterpene with medicinal properties, which has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Selinopsis montana are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for reducing pain and inflammation, as well as protecting against cell damage. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to treat conditions such as arthritis, fever, and respiratory issues.
